title: RevOps Expert
description: Join Remote's Revenue Operations team to optimize sales processes and system architecture. Drive strategic initiatives aligned with the go-to-market strategy, champion scalable process design using methodologies like Six Sigma and Agile, and implement high-impact solutions. Requires deep Salesforce/SFDC expertise, experience with automation tools (LeanData, Zapier, Camunda), strong process design skills, and a data-driven mindset. SaaS/B2B and remote startup experience preferred. Fully remote.

Only minor consideration is the emphasis on automation tools (LeanData, Camunda) which aren't explicitly highlighted in the profile.

I've architected similar multi-tool ecosystems (including LeanData implementations) that drove significant improvements in pipeline visibility and forecast accuracy. I'd love to explore how I can help Remote optimize your sales systems and process design at scale.
